events.summary: Viridian Therapeutics reported a trial readout for elebrobart (VRDN-003), a subcutaneous anti-FcRn antibody for active thyroid eye disease.
Viridian Therapeutics has a trial readout for elegrobart (VRDN-003) in active thyroid eye disease listed as a catalyst for today on an FDA calendar.
Viridian Therapeutics also appears on FDA catalyst calendars with a near-term trial and regulatory backdrop around active thyroid eye disease.
Lake Street Capital upgraded Avita Medical from Hold to Buy and raised its price target from $3.50 to $6.00.
FDA granted 510(k) clearance for Cohealyx, a product for full-thickness wounds and burns.
AVITA Medical shipped the first RECELL GO order following FDA approval to support its first clinical use.
Lake Street upgraded AVITA Medical to Buy from Hold and raised its price target to $6 from $3.50.

events.summary: GSK is acquiring RAPT Therapeutics in an all-cash tender offer deal worth $1.9 billion net of cash, expected to close in Q1 2026.
